products.name: Petite Baby Cheeks Blush Stick - Petal
products.description: Adorn your canvas (we're talking eyes, cheeks and lips) with a splash of colour using Westman Atelier's Petite Baby Cheeks Blush Stick (2.5g). Boasting a buttery texture that effortlessly melts into skin, this blush is powered by biomimicry pigment technology to deliver creamy, buildable pigment that layers well over liquid and powder products (without interfering with your make up underneath).

products.name: Artist Colour Pencil : Eye Lip and Brow Pencil
products.description: On a quest to streamline your beauty bag? Discover the Artist Color Pencil (1.4g) from MAKE UP FOR EVER. Boasting multiple powers, this crayon glides effortlessly across lash lines, lip line, brows or anywhere you see fit (faux freckles anyone?). Wherever you choose to dot, line or swipe, its smooth formula delivers a highly pigmented, matte finish that blends with ease. Plus, thanks to a wooden casing, it can be sharpened to the max.

products.name: Tinted Blur Balm (Various Shades)
products.description: Meet the Laura Mercier Tinted Blur Balm, a next-gen balm-to-powder tint that perfects skin instantly while improving it over time. This lightweight formula delivers a soft-focus, matte finish with sheer-to-medium coverage that blurs, sculpt and smooth in a single step. Infused with peptides, it visibly refines texture, boosts elasticity and reduces the appearance of pores. Enriched with vegetal squalane and camelina sativa seed oil, it soothes and protects the skin’s barrier, leaving a natural, long-lasting matte glow.

products.name: Juice Box Lip Tint 4.5g
products.description: Add a splash of juicy, radiant colour to your lips.This unique lip tint features Water-Oil Remix Technology, transforming from a water-based stain into a nourishing oil that delivers up to 12 hours of vibrant, glossy colour. Infused with the brand’s Juicy Berry Cold Pressed Complex, peptides and ceramides, it hydrates, plumps and protects lips while providing a luminous finish.

products.name: Luxury Palette - Pillow Talk
products.description: Whether you're an eye makeup aficionado or only just beginning to experiment with eye enhancement. Inspired by the brand's fan-favourite 'Pillow Talk' hue, the ultra-flattering nude shade has been crafted into an alluring eyeshadow palette. It stars four beautifully buttery, complementary shades to make all eye colours pop with a pearly pink, matte mauve, soft brown and shimmering rose gold.

products.name: Hermès Silky Lipstick 3g
products.description: Drawing from the sumptuous lustre of Hermés silk, the esteemed French house dreams up the Rouge Hermés Silky lipstick. Enriched with a nourishing botanical blend of plumping raspberry leaf and softening sesame seed extract, this velvety formula veils your lips in a juicy kiss of colour. It's also crafted with a slim, bevel-shaped bullet to precisely colour and contour your pout.

products.name: Gentle Cleansing Foam 200ml
products.description: Say hello to the Sulwhasoo Gentle Cleansing Foam (200ml) transforms your daily cleanse into a moment of pure indulgence. Its dense, fine bubbles effortlessly lift away impurities, excess oil and makeup, leaving skin feeling fresh and purified without stripping moisture. Enriched with the brand's Hydra Capture Complex, it helps your skin retain vital hydration even after cleansing, so it feels soft, plump and comforted.

products.name: Collagen Routine
products.description: The Medicube Collagen Routine offers a complete set of skincare essentials to promote a smooth, hydrated and luminous complexion. It includes the Triple Collagen Serum 4.0, a creamy formula with three types of collagen, hyaluronic acid and niacinamide that visibly firms, softens and enhances skin texture. The Collagen Jelly Cream is a translucent, glass-like moisturiser infused with nano collagen and squalane, providing intense hydration and refining uneven skin tone.

products.name: Age-R Booster Pro Ex Pink
products.description: Elevate your skincare at home with the Medicube Age-R Booster Pro Ex in Pink, a device combining advanced tech like electroporation, microcurrent, EMS, LED and sonic vibration. Suitable for all skin types, it features four targeted modes that boost radiance, plump fine lines, contour and reduce enlarged pore sizes. These modes work together to improve skin tone, elasticity and texture. Regular use enhances serum absorption, visibly smooths and lifts and promotes a brighter, more youthful complexion.

products.name: Bio Collagen-Real Deep Mask (4 Pack)
products.description: Discover intense hydration and visible skin renewal with the Biodance Bio Collagen-Real Deep Mask. Powered by ultra-low molecular collagen and oligo-hyaluronic acid, this hydrogel mask delivers moisture, works to tighten pores and improving elasticity. The probiotic-infused formula protects your skin’s barrier, helping to prevent premature aging while smoothing the look of fine lines and wrinkles. Perfect for long-lasting hydration, whether worn overnight or for a few hours, its innovative design ensures maximum absorption and adhesion.

products.name: Crush leopard-print linen-blend midi dress
products.description: Leopard print, adjustable crystal-embellished shoulder straps, crystal-embellished sweetheart neck, boned bodice, lightly padded cups, belt loops, detachable adjustable belt with bow embellishment, side slip pockets, smocked panel at back, gathered details, curved hem, partially lined. Concealed zip fastening at back. 55% linen, 45% silk; lining: 100% cotton. Dry clean.

products.name: Le Bisou Ceinture Shoulder Bag
products.description: Crafted from supple red leather with a slim silhouette, subtle gold-tone logo embellishment, and adjustable shoulder strap. Length: 28 cm, Width: 2 cm, Height: 11 cm, Handle drop: 20 cm adjustable.

products.name: Julia pumps
products.description: Brown leather and PVC pumps with crystal spike embellishments, slim stiletto heel, adjustable ankle strap, sharp pointed toe, and branded leather insole. Heel height: 9.5 cm.

products.name: Bloom Large embellished drop earrings
products.description: Gold-tone drop earrings with glass floral-inspired adornments. Material: 12kt gold-plated brass, glass, stainless steel. Butterfly-back fastening. One size.

products.name: Leopard Print A-Line Dress
products.description: Spaghetti straps. High waist. Woven fabric. 100% Polyester.

products.name: SCINTILLA Sandals
products.description: Heeled sandal. Square open toe. Buckle closure. Upper: Synthetic. Lining: Textile. Sole: Rubber. Heel Height: 9.5 CM.

products.name: Shoulder Tote Bag Retro Half Handbag
products.description: Compact yet Spacious: Our stylish casual retro leather shoulder bag strikes the balance between compactness and space. Despite its portable size, it offers enough room to accommodate your daily essentials, including wallets, phones, glasses, keys, and more. Size: One-size.

products.name: LONG GOLDEN EARRINGS VOL
products.description: 24 K gold-plated matte metal long earrings. Design inspired by the dance of starlings on the waters of the Delta de l'Ebre. Butterfly nut closure.
